hero.title: Senior Software Engineer | Angular – Data Visualization
hero.intro1: Senior frontend engineer with 12 years of experience building large-scale and distributed enterprise web applications in finance and SaaS environments.
hero.intro2: Specialized in frontend architecture, performance optimization, CI/CD pipelines and end-to-end testing frameworks.
hero.intro3: Led frontend architecture across 6 Scrum teams (~10 engineers) building enterprise finance tools at Swiss Re.
hero.intro4: Built an internal shared library (45+ components) adopted across finance department applications.
hero.intro5: Optimized analytics dashboards at PostFinance, reducing rendering time 25s → 2s, DOM nodes 170k → 17k, and bundle size 3.25MB → 1.73MB.
hero.intro6: Designed CI/CD pipelines and end-to-end testing strategies (Playwright, Cypress) used across multiple enterprise applications.

postfinance.title: Lead Frontend Engineer
postfinance.subtitle: Data Analytics Platform
responsibilities: Developed an Angular 18 data analytics platform enabling ~3,500 employees to generate dashboards dynamically from XML report definitions
Optimized rendering of large dashboards, reducing DOM nodes from ~170k to ~17k and improving load time from 25s to 2s
Reduced frontend bundle size from 3.25MB to 1.73MB, improving application startup and runtime performance
Reduced full build time from 241s to 11s and incremental rebuilds from 114s to 1.5s
Designed and implemented CI/CD pipeline using GitLab, automating build, testing and deployment workflows
Built Playwright end-to-end testing suite to validate complex reporting scenarios
Led internal Angular Signals workshops, introducing modern Angular patterns

suva.title: Lead Frontend Engineer
suva.subtitle: Insurance Claims Processing Applications
responsibilities: Led development of four Angular 18 internal applications used by ~500 employees to process insurance claims
Designed complex state management architecture using Redux for predictable state handling
Implemented translation management system using Tolgee for multilingual UI requirements
Built and maintained Playwright end-to-end testing suite to improve regression detection

swissre.title: Lead Frontend Engineer
swissre.subtitle: Finance Department - Shared Component Library
responsibilities: Initiated and built an internal shared library (45+ components) based on Angular Material, used across finance department applications (~14,000 employees globally)
Started the shared components independently and grew adoption organically across 6 Scrum teams (~10 developers)
Led the shared library development by defining roadmap, managing backlog, and collaborating with product owners
Introduced Cypress end-to-end testing strategy across teams
Introduced test harness to test frontend component end to end
Designed and maintained Azure CI/CD pipelines, optimized to run under 25 minutes using parallelization and caching

marksandspencer.title: Lead Frontend Engineer
marksandspencer.subtitle: E-commerce Platform
responsibilities: Built a React-based sofa configurator for the e-commerce platform serving ~30M customers annually
Led development of interactive map integration using Bing Maps V8 and Vanilla JavaScript
Contributed to the first React integration within a legacy in-house frontend framework

managed247.title: Lead Engineer
managed247.subtitle: Cloud-based Real-time Analytics Platform
responsibilities: Architected and developed a cloud-based real-time analytics platform from scratch using Angular, Node.js, Express and MongoDB
Built real-time data visualizations using D3.js and WebSockets (Socket.IO, SignalR)
Developed highly customizable dashboards using Gridster, RxJS and Redux
Designed and implemented CI/CD pipeline using Docker, Codeship and Quay.io

workforce.title: Frontend Engineer / Scrum Master
workforce.subtitle: Enterprise Workforce Management SaaS
responsibilities: Contributed to development of workforce management SaaS platform used by large global retailers
Increased AngularJS unit test coverage from 60% to 90%
Migrated application from AngularJS to Angular 2
Led end-to-end testing automation initiatives
Facilitated Scrum ceremonies and continuous improvement initiatives

unisphere.title: Startup Co-founder
unisphere.subtitle: Cloud-based Virtual Learning Environment
responsibilities: Built an AngularJS and Ruby on Rails MVP improving communication between students and teachers
Delivered the first production-ready platform within 5 months, deploying it across 5 universities
Selected to join Strasbourg and Oxford incubation programs

cranfield.title: MSc in Distributed & Parallel Computing
cranfield.description: Focused on parallel computing and high-performance computing, working with the university's ASTRAL supercomputer. Gained experience with distributed systems, virtualization, containerization, and cloud computing infrastructure.

esigelec.title: MSc in IT Management
esigelec.description: Studied core computer science topics including algorithms, software engineering, and distributed systems, with a strong emphasis on project-based development and collaborative engineering.

mountaineering.title: Mountaineering
mountaineering.description: Passionate about alpine adventures including summiting Mont Blanc, tour skiing the Haute Route, and trail running in the mountains.

basketball.title: Basketball
basketball.description: Played competitively for 12 years in regional teams, developing teamwork, discipline, and leadership skills on and off the court.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Co-founded a tech startup, created mobile apps, contribute to open source projects, and maintain a development blog to share knowledge with the community.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.intro: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
